About me

I make things
that feel right.

Based in Ahmedabad · Available for internships, freelance projects & creative opportunities

Hey, I'm Kunjal a designer who genuinely loves the quiet process of making things beautiful. I'm also learning frontend development, so I understand both how something should look and how it actually gets built.

I'm obsessed with clean layouts, soft color palettes, and tiny interaction details that most people never notice but always feel. Right now I'm in my growth era experimenting, making mistakes, learning fast.
